text.title: helm-charts Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for helm-charts as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using helm upgrade without --atomic in CI/CD.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A failed upgrade without --atomic leaves the release in a degraded state requiring manual intervention. --atomic ensures clean rollback.
